title: polystichum brachypterum
intro: Polystichum brachypterum, also known as the Chinese sword fern or Chinese sword brake fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Polystichum brachypterum include reducing fever, alleviating coughs and respiratory issues, and promoting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Polystichum brachypterum can be used to make tea, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
